text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the race, Sweep Tosho sees
Kawakami Princess and a certain peer in the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an effort to ensure that her magic will blow
away everyone's "lame" attitudes, she vows to
Zenno Rob Roy that she'll hold nothing back in
the race ahead.
